# SPY Iron Condor Trader — LLM Index
> Paper-trading SPY iron condors to validate a quantitative options strategy.

## Status
Validation phase: proving 80%+ win rate over 30 trades.
Paper equity: $95,324 (started $100K). Trade 1 of 30 open.

## Strategy
- SPY iron condors, 15-delta, $10-wide wings, 30-45 DTE
- Exit: 50% profit or 7 DTE, stop at 100% of credit
- Backed by 71,417-trade study (projectfinance.com, 2007-2017)

## URLs
- Progress Dashboard: https://igorganapolsky.github.io/trading/rag-query/
- Repository: https://github.com/IgorGanapolsky/trading

## Tech
- Python 3.11, Alpaca API (paper), GRPO ML optimization
- LanceDB RAG over 179 lessons learned
- GitHub Actions CI/CD
